promoted_facts.fact: Transfer fee in Operating Agreement is $5,500 (Section 11.3(E)(1)), with escalation to $6,000 effective Jan 1, 2025. FDD Item 6 states $6,000.
promoted_facts.action: Confirm $6,000 is current as of issuance date. No change needed.

promoted_facts.fact: ADQ management fee on sales promotion funds is 7% — but only on SPF payments up to 3% of gross sales. No management fee on SPF above 3%.
promoted_facts.action: Already in canonical. Confirm detail promoted.

promoted_facts.fact: 1/7 of total ADQ management fees credited back to NMF budget as voluntary corporate contribution.
USCI margin commitment is permanent and would survive divestiture to buyer (unless buyer is a cooperative that votes for different structure).
Personal guarantee scope is unlimited — joint and several, all owners, full performance guarantee, includes payment of enforcement costs, not diminished by bankruptcy.
Limitations on claims: 1 year from discovery or 2 years from act, whichever is earlier. Exception for underreporting, indemnification, and trademark claims.
Company purchase option on termination/expiration: may deduct termination fee from purchase price of restaurant assets.
Maryland financial assurance: initial fees deferred until opening.
Franchisee incentive programs: remodel/technology/new store incentives amortized 3-7 years. Unamortized portion expensed on location closure.
